description: Registry capability providing stable indirection by binding symbolic keys to opaque addresses and underlying storage references. Meta-capability that coordinates access to other storage capabilities.

path.description: Filesystem path to JSONL registry file (append-only)

architecture.purpose: Provides stable symbolic addressing layer above concrete storage

bindings.target_cs: Which storage capability holds the actual data (e.g., 'CS_MUTABLE_JSON_V0')

use_cases: Address book: map kyc_key → user_id in user index
Name service: map DNS-like names → storage locations
Content addressing: map human keys → content hashes
Symbolic links: stable references across storage reorganization
